title: Midsize Western buyout firms continue Japan push with new offices
summary:

fullArticle:
KPS, Aurelius eye businesses spun off from restructuring Japanese companies

These firms, latecomers to Japan, are differentiating themselves by avoiding the blockbuster deals focused on by major firms. (Source photos obtained by Nikkei)

TOKYO -- U.S. and European buyout firms are continuing to expand into Japan, setting up shop in the country and preparing to snap up unprofitable businesses being spun off by large Japanese corporations....
